behaviors.description: Exponential backoff wait time doubles on each consecutive failure and is capped at configured maximum.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=no, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. This is primarily deterministic backoff math/state progression, so Unit is the minimum level by rule 5 (else Unit).
behaviors.test_description: Call the backoff calculator/retry-state function across failure counts (1..N), assert delays follow 2^n growth and never exceed maxBackoffMs.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Applied rule order exactly; no higher-priority features triggered.

behaviors.description: Retry logic detects rate-limit responses and computes correct wait time before next attempt.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. Requires correct wiring between HTTP response classification (e.g., 429/headers) and retry scheduler, so Integration by rule 4.
behaviors.test_description: Use a mocked transport/server returning rate-limit responses with representative headers; verify classifier marks retriable and computed delay matches policy/header precedence.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: No content-quality judgment; Agentic guard not triggered.

behaviors.description: After waiting, client resends original request and transparently returns successful result.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. Validates async retry orchestration and request replay plumbing across components, so Integration by rule 4.
behaviors.test_description: Simulate first call rate-limited then next call success; assert same request payload is resent after delay and caller receives success value without manual retry handling.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: No real-infra dependency required for minimum viable detection.

behaviors.description: After max retries, client throws typed QuotaExhaustedError instead of generic error.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. Error typing depends on retry-loop termination and error-mapping integration, so Integration by rule 4.
behaviors.test_description: Force repeated rate-limit responses through maxRetries; assert thrown error is QuotaExhaustedError with expected fields and not a generic transport exception.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Classification follows rule order; no higher-level feature applies.

behaviors.description: Complete retry chain terminates correctly (no infinite loop) before surfacing final error.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. This checks control-flow wiring across retries, counters, and quota state, so Integration by rule 4.
behaviors.test_description: Run with persistent rate-limit responses and bounded maxRetries; assert attempt count equals configured bound, elapsed behavior matches policy, and promise settles with terminal error.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: `multi_step_agentic` is false; this is non-agentic control flow, not Workflow-level behavior.

behaviors.description: Concurrent async callers in one process consume the same shared quota bucket.
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. Requires cross-caller shared-state coordination inside library process, which is integration of concurrency + quota manager.
behaviors.test_description: Fire multiple concurrent call() invocations against a controlled mock endpoint; assert aggregate token usage follows one shared bucket and not per-caller independent buckets.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: System tests may improve confidence, but minimum required by rule map remains Integration without mandatory real infra.

behaviors.description: Queued waiting requests are dispatched in original submission order (FIFO).
behaviors.justification: Feature map: wiring=yes, real_infra=no, model_judgment=no, multi_step_agentic=no. FIFO guarantees depend on queueing and dispatch integration across async boundaries, so Integration by rule 4.
behaviors.test_description: Submit staggered concurrent requests while quota forces waiting; record dispatch sequence at transport layer and assert it matches enqueue order.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: No model-output quality evaluation; Agentic guard remains off.
